assertions.evidence: Lead drawer for New lead does not show any 'Convert to Case' button (DOM eval count=0), but Converted-state visibility could not be validated because no Converted leads exist and drawer status controls are disabled in read-only mode.
Could not trigger 'Convert to Case' flow because no lead could be put into Converted state in this run (read-only controls disabled, and Converted filter returned zero leads).
Analytics page shows 'Conversion Funnel' with stage counts and rates: New, Contacted, Converted and rate rows (New → Contacted, Contacted → Converted, Overall New→Converted).

Analytics page shows 'Time-to-Contact' metric section with expected copy ('Average days from lead date to first contact'). Current dataset has no contacted leads, so fallback no-data message is rendered.
Analytics page shows 'Lead Age Distribution' chart with bucket labels 0-7d, 8-30d, 31-60d, and 60+d.

End-to-end converted-lead-to-case flow could not run: no Converted leads available, status filter for Converted/Contacted returns zero leads, and lead drawer mutation controls are disabled (read-only), preventing conversion action.

commands.observation: App loaded successfully on local Vite server.
Lead drawer opened for a New lead; status buttons visible but disabled in read-only mode.

commands.command: agent-browser --session 3d5704652f90__u1 eval DOM check for 'Convert to Case' button
commands.observation: Returned {count:0}, no Convert to Case button present in current drawer state.
No leads matched current filters in Converted state.
Conversion Funnel, Time-to-Contact, and Lead Age Distribution sections rendered.
No console errors captured during tested flows.
Network evidence captured after reload, including leads.json/storm_candidates.json fetch and Supabase REST reads.

frictions.description: Default interactive snapshot refs did not include clickable table rows for opening LeadDrawer; required snapshot with -C cursor-interactive mode to discover row click targets.
frictions.resolution: Used `agent-browser snapshot -i -C` and clicked cursor-interactive row refs.

blockers.description: No Contacted or Converted leads available in current data/state; Status filter yielded empty results for both.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Cleared filters, retried status filters, reopened leads, and verified no matching rows rendered.

blockers.description: Lead drawer mutation controls are disabled in read-only mode, so a New lead could not be advanced to Converted for conversion flow validation.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Checked drawer controls/buttons and status selector state; all mutation controls were disabled.
